title: Ganga Sati Pan Bai

title: Radha Krishna

desc: Raadha's voice causes problems when Krish wrongly falls for her, instead of Kiara. Misinformation sparks drama, mistaken feelings, and unexpected consequences for everyone involved everywhere.
